items.title: obra/superpowers
items.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
items.author: obra
items.summary_zh: Superpowers 是一套面向 AI 代理的“技能框架”和软件开发方法论。它试图解决当前大模型在复杂任务中缺乏结构化思考的问题——通过定义清晰的技能单元和协作流程，让 AI 代理像人类工程师一样分步解决问题。这个框架不仅给 AI 用，也可以指导人类团队如何拆解需求、编写代码、进行测试。如果你在探索如何让 AI 更可靠地参与实际项目开发，或者想建立更高效的工程协作流程，值得关注。
items.summary_en: Superpowers is an agentic skills framework and software development methodology designed to make AI agents work more reliably on complex engineering tasks. Instead of letting a model guess its way through a problem, it decomposes work into defined skills, checks, and iterative steps—similar to how a senior engineer would approach a feature. The framework is practical enough to be used by human teams as well. If you're building AI-powered coding tools or want to inject disciplined structure into your development workflow, this project offers a fresh, actionable approach.

items.title: mattpocock/skills
items.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
items.author: mattpocock
items.summary_zh: 这个项目是著名 TypeScript 教育家 Matt Pocock 分享的一份“技能清单”，直接来自他的 AI 编程助手 Claude 的配置文件。它列出了他认为一名“真正工程师”应该掌握的核心能力——从代码审查、架构决策到技术债管理，覆盖了远比语法更重要的工程实践。与其说是代码库，不如说是一份工程文化的宣言。适合想提升团队工程水平或建立个人技术成长路线的开发者阅读。
items.summary_en: This is Matt Pocock's personal skill list for 'real engineers,' extracted straight from his Claude AI configuration. It goes far beyond coding syntax to cover code review, architecture decisions, tech debt management, and communication—the soft and hard skills that separate experienced engineers from beginners. It's less a codebase and more a manifesto on engineering culture. If you're looking to level up your professional practice or define what 'good engineering' means for your team, this concise list is a great starting point.

items.title: vercel/next.js
items.description: The React Framework
items.author: vercel
items.summary_zh: 由Vercel维护的Next.js是一个基于React的全栈框架，它通过服务端渲染、静态生成和文件路由等功能，极大简化了现代Web应用的构建流程。无论是个人开发者还是企业团队，都能利用它快速搭建高性能、SEO友好的网站。目前它已成为GitHub上最热门的React框架之一，活跃的社区和丰富的插件生态让开发体验更加流畅。
items.summary_en: Next.js, maintained by Vercel, is a React framework that simplifies building modern web apps with server-side rendering, static generation, and file-based routing. It solves performance and SEO challenges for React developers. Its popularity on GitHub reflects its ability to streamline workflows for both solo developers and large teams, making it a go-to choice for production-grade sites.

items.title: iptv-org/iptv
items.description: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world
items.author: iptv-org
items.summary_zh: 这个项目收集了全球各地公开可用的IPTV频道，让你能轻松观看来自世界各国的电视节目。对于热爱探索不同文化节目或身处海外想收看家乡频道的人来说，它提供了一个免费且便捷的聚合入口，无需繁琐的订阅流程。重要的是，它完全开源并由社区维护，频道列表会持续更新，有效解决了寻找稳定免费IPTV源的常见痛点。
items.summary_en: iptv-org/iptv is a community-maintained collection of freely available IPTV channels from around the world. It aggregates thousands of live TV streams into a single, structured playlist, making it easy to explore international TV content without expensive subscriptions. This open-source project solves the headache of finding reliable, free IPTV sources by keeping the list constantly updated. Anyone interested in global TV content—from expats to cord-cutters—can benefit by simply loading the playlist into any compatible player.

items.title: microsoft/TypeScript
items.description: TypeScript is a superset of JavaScript that compiles to clean JavaScript output.
items.author: microsoft
items.summary_zh: TypeScript是微软推出的JavaScript超集，它在保持JS灵活性的同时加入了静态类型检查，让开发者能在编译阶段捕获错误，提升代码可靠性和可维护性。无论是大型企业项目还是个人库，TypeScript都能提供更好的工具支持和文档理解。如今它已是前端和Node.js领域的标配，GitHub上持续高涨的热度证明了它的核心地位。
items.summary_en: TypeScript, a superset of JavaScript developed by Microsoft, adds static type checking to catch errors at compile time, improving code reliability and maintainability. It addresses the challenge of scaling JavaScript in large projects. Now a standard in front-end and Node.js development, its popularity on GitHub underscores its role in making codebases safer and easier to refactor.

items.title: oven-sh/bun
items.description: Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one
items.author: oven-sh
items.summary_zh: Bun是一个由Oven.sh打造的全新JavaScript运行时，集运行时、打包器、测试运行器和包管理器于一体，以惊人的启动速度和性能著称。它采用Zig语言编写，原生支持TypeScript和JSX，能大幅提升开发效率。对于追求极速开发体验的前端和Node.js开发者来说，Bun正成为一个极具吸引力的替代方案。
items.summary_en: Bun is an all-in-one JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager built by Oven.sh. Known for its blazing startup speed and performance, it's written in Zig and natively supports TypeScript and JSX. It solves the problem of slow tooling by replacing multiple tools with a single, fast one. Developers seeking rapid iteration will find Bun a compelling alternative.

items.title: addyosmani/agent-skills
items.description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.
items.author: addyosmani
items.summary_zh: agent-skills 是 Google Chrome 团队 Addy Osmani 发起的开源项目，旨在为AI编码代理注入生产级的工程技能。项目提供了一套精心设计的技能库，涵盖代码审查、调试、测试生成、性能优化、安全审计等专业领域。每个技能以清晰的提示（prompt）和示例形式呈现，使AI代理能像资深工程师一样思考和工作。该项目的重要性在于填补了当前AI编码助手的核心短板——多数工具只能生成代码片段，但缺乏对代码质量、可维护性和工程规范的深层次理解。受益对象是所有使用AI辅助编程的开发者，尤其是团队中的高级工程师和架构师。GitHub趋势榜上的高关注度反映了开发者对“更有用AI代理”的迫切需求。项目本身是纯文本/知识库形式，依赖LLM本身的推理能力，不绑定特定平台，因此极易集成到Cline、GitHub Copilot等工具中。
items.summary_en: Agent-skills is an open-source project by Google Chrome's Addy Osmani that equips AI coding agents with production-grade engineering competencies. It provides a curated library of skills—code review, debugging, test generation, performance optimization, and security auditing—each packaged as well-crafted prompts with real-world examples. The project addresses a critical gap in current AI coding assistants: most can generate code but lack deep understanding of quality, maintainability, and engineering best practices. Senior developers, teams adopting AI-assisted workflows, and tool builders benefit directly from these reusable skill definitions. Its rapid rise on GitHub signals urgent demand for more capable, context-aware AI agents. The project is platform-agnostic (pure text/prompt libraries) and integrates easily with agents like Cline, Claude Code, or Copilot. By codifying expert knowledge into prompt templates, it pushes AI coding from toy examples toward production readiness.

items.title: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
items.description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT GPT-5.6, Codex GPT-5.6, GPT-5.5. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
items.author: asgeirtj
items.summary_zh: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks 是一个 GitHub 项目，它收集了 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 多个大模型的系统提示词，包括 Claude Fable 5、Opus 4.8、ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking 等。这些提示词揭示了模型背后如何被引导、如何设定角色和限制，对 AI 研究者和开发者理解模型行为非常有价值。它引发了关于提示工程和模型安全边界的讨论，也是窥探顶级 AI 内部设计的一个窗口。
items.summary_en: This GitHub repository compiles leaked system prompts from popular AI models like Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 and Opus 4.8, as well as OpenAI's ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking and GPT 5.5 Instant. By exposing the hidden instructions that shape how these models behave, it offers rare insight into prompt engineering, safety guardrails, and role-setting techniques. AI researchers and developers can learn how top models are orchestrated, but the leak also raises important questions about access control and intellectual property in the generative AI race.

items.title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
items.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
items.author: Panniantong
items.summary_zh: Agent-Reach是一个命令行工具，让AI代理能够直接“看到”整个互联网。它支持读取和搜索Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、Bilibili、小红书等主流平台，而且不需要任何API费用。对于开发AI代理的人来说，最大的痛点就是如何让代理获取实时、跨平台的信息，这款工具通过简单的CLI命令就解决了这个问题。无论是做社交媒体分析、技术趋势追踪还是内容聚合，开发者都可以零成本地为自己的AI装上“眼睛”。
items.summary_en: Agent-Reach is a CLI tool that gives AI agents the ability to 'see' the entire internet. It enables reading and searching across major platforms like Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, and Xiaohongshu — all without any API fees. The biggest pain point for AI agent developers is getting real-time, cross-platform data; Agent-Reach solves this with a single command. Whether you're building a social media analyzer, a tech trend tracker, or a content aggregator, you can now equip your AI with 'eyes' at zero cost. It's a game-changer for hobbyists and startups who previously had to rely on expensive or rate-limited APIs.

items.title: hashicorp/terraform
items.description: Terraform enables you to safely and predictably create, change, and improve infrastructure. It is a source-available tool that codifies APIs into declarative configuration files that can be shared amongst team members, treated as code, edited, reviewed, and versioned.
items.author: hashicorp
items.summary_zh: HashiCorp的Terraform是一个基础设施即代码工具，允许用户通过声明式配置文件来安全、可预测地创建和管理云资源。它支持AWS、Azure、GCP等众多云平台，解决了手动配置环境容易出错且难以重复的问题。无论是运维团队还是开发者，都能借助Terraform实现基础设施的版本控制和自动化部署，显著提升效率。
items.summary_en: Terraform by HashiCorp is an infrastructure as code tool that lets you define and provision cloud resources using declarative configuration files. It solves the problem of manual, error-prone infrastructure management by enabling version-controlled, repeatable deployments across AWS, Azure, GCP, and more. Ops teams and developers benefit from predictable changes, state tracking, and automation, making it a cornerstone of modern DevOps workflows.

items.title: 第二代“豆包手机”要来了
items.summary_zh: 字节跳动旗下的豆包品牌即将推出第二代手机产品，延续其AI原生体验和软硬件整合策略。这款手机预计会深度集成豆包大模型，提供智能助手、实时翻译、创意生成等特色功能。在智能手机创新乏力的当下，豆包手机试图通过AI能力打造差异化竞争力，瞄准对智能交互有较高需求的年轻用户群体。
items.summary_en: ByteDance's Doubao brand is gearing up to launch its second-generation smartphone, doubling down on AI-native experiences and tight hardware-software integration. The device is expected to deeply embed the Doubao large language model, offering features like an intelligent assistant, real-time translation, and creative content generation. As smartphone innovation plateaus, Doubao aims to differentiate through AI, targeting young users who crave smarter, more interactive devices.

items.title: 小米终于给中年人造车了
items.summary_zh: 小米终于为中年人造车了，这指的是其首款汽车SU7在设计上更偏向成熟稳重的风格，迎合了中年用户的审美和家庭需求。这款车不仅解决了这部分人群对智能电动车的续航和舒适性顾虑，还通过小米生态实现了手机与汽车的深度联动。对于追求品质又不想过于张扬的中年群体来说，小米汽车提供了一个兼顾科技感与实用性的新选择。
items.summary_en: Xiaomi has finally built a car for the middle-aged, referring to its first electric vehicle SU7 which leans towards a mature and stable design to appeal to older users' aesthetics and family needs. This car addresses their concerns about range and comfort in smart EVs while deeply integrating with Xiaomi's ecosystem for seamless phone-car connectivity. For the middle-aged demographic seeking quality without being flashy, Xiaomi offers a new choice that balances tech-savvy features with practicality.

items.title: MiniMax，替整个AI行业挨打
items.summary_zh: MiniMax替整个AI行业挨打，指的是这家中国AI初创公司在发展过程中遭遇了诸多非议，从模型内容安全到商业变现，几乎每个痛点都被放大检视。它的困境其实是行业共性的缩影——技术快速迭代时，监管争议、伦理难题和盈利压力都集中爆发。MiniMax成为靶子，反而让其他同行得以喘息，专心解决根本问题。
items.summary_en: MiniMax has taken the heat for the entire AI industry, as this Chinese startup faces intense scrutiny over everything from model content safety to commercialization challenges. Its struggles mirror the common pains of the sector: rapid tech iteration brings concentrated regulatory debates, ethical dilemmas, and profitability pressure. By becoming the punching bag, MiniMax gives other players breathing room to focus on core issues.

items.title: Codex死了，死得其所
items.summary_zh: Codex死了，死得其所——OpenAI的代码生成模型正式退役，被更强大的GPT-4 Turbo取代。Codex曾在编程辅助领域开疆拓土，但如今它的能力已被整合进更大的模型中，单独存在反而显得冗余。这个淘汰过程是AI技术迭代的自然结果，也意味着开发者将获得更一体化、更智能的编码体验。
items.summary_en: Codex is dead, and it died a good death—OpenAI's code generation model has been retired, replaced by the more powerful GPT-4 Turbo. Codex pioneered in code assistance, but its capabilities are now absorbed into a larger model, making standalone existence redundant. This phase-out is a natural outcome of AI iteration, meaning developers will enjoy a more integrated and intelligent coding experience.

items.title: 伯南克出山，Anthropic杀死比赛？
items.summary_zh: 伯南克出山，Anthropic杀死比赛？前美联储主席伯南克加入Anthropic董事会，给这家AI公司带来了前所未有的政策和经济经验。他的加盟不仅提升了Anthropic在监管对话中的可信度，还可能帮助公司在风险治理上制定标准。这一举动让Anthropic在竞争中占据优势，甚至有终结AI军备竞赛的势头——毕竟，懂经济和政治的人来掌舵，比单纯拼技术更致命。
items.summary_en: Bernanke joins, and Anthropic kills the game? The former Fed chair has joined Anthropic's board, bringing unparalleled policy and economic expertise. His presence boosts Anthropic's credibility in regulatory discussions and may help set standards for risk governance. This move gives Anthropic a competitive edge, potentially ending the AI arms race—because having someone who understands economy and politics at the helm is deadlier than pure tech competition.

items.title: OpenAI，终于把大模型做成 iPhone 了
items.summary_zh: OpenAI终于把大模型做成iPhone了——他们推出了ChatGPT的语音和图像功能，还有GPT Store，让用户能像使用应用商店一样加载各种定制AI助手。这种一体化、易上手的体验降低了AI的使用门槛，就像iPhone当年把智能手机带给大众一样。对于普通用户来说，这意味着不用再学复杂指令，只需说话或拍照就能调用AI能力。
items.summary_en: OpenAI has finally turned the large model into an iPhone—launching voice and image capabilities for ChatGPT along with the GPT Store, allowing users to load custom AI assistants like using an app store. This all-in-one, user-friendly experience lowers the barrier to AI adoption, much like how the iPhone brought smartphones to the masses. For ordinary users, it means no more learning complex commands; just speak or take a photo to invoke AI power.

items.title: 9点1氪丨“国产存储第一股”长鑫科技公布承销团阵容；SK海力士登陆美股，上市首日大涨近13%；OpenAI推出ChatGPT智能体
items.summary_zh: 国产存储芯片龙头长鑫科技公布了其IPO承销团阵容，标志着这家“国产存储第一股”距离上市更进一步。与此同时，韩国存储巨头SK海力士在美股上市首日股价大涨近13%，显示出市场对存储行业的热情。此外，OpenAI推出了ChatGPT智能体功能，让AI助手能够自主执行任务，进一步推动了大模型的应用落地。
items.summary_en: Changxin Memory Technologies, China's leading memory chip maker, announced its IPO underwriting syndicate, advancing toward becoming the country's first publicly traded memory stock. Meanwhile, SK Hynix made its US stock market debut with a nearly 13% surge, reflecting strong investor confidence in the memory sector. OpenAI also launched ChatGPT agents, enabling the AI assistant to autonomously perform tasks, pushing the boundaries of large model applications.

items.title: 雅迪凭什么比理想赚钱？
items.summary_zh: 电动两轮车巨头雅迪的盈利能力竟超越了新能源车企理想汽车，这一反差引发行业思考。分析指出，雅迪凭借庞大的销量规模、低廉的制造成本以及成熟的渠道布局，在薄利多销中实现了可观利润；而理想汽车虽单车利润高，但研发与营销投入巨大。雅迪的成功为中国制造业提供了另一种盈利范本。
items.summary_en: Yadea, a leading electric two-wheeler maker, has shown higher profitability than Li Auto, a prominent Chinese EV startup, sparking industry discussion. Analysts attribute this to Yadea's massive sales volume, low manufacturing costs, and extensive distribution network, enabling healthy profits through thin margins. In contrast, Li Auto's high per-vehicle profit is offset by heavy R&D and marketing expenses. Yadea's success offers an alternative profit model for Chinese manufacturing.

items.title: 免费早餐，坑了多少好酒店？
items.summary_zh: OpenAI的“二号人物”突然宣布离职，这一消息震惊了科技界。作为公司核心领导之一，他的离开可能对OpenAI的战略方向和管理团队稳定性产生影响。尽管具体原因未明，但此事凸显了AI行业快速变化中人才流动的频繁以及内部治理的挑战。
items.summary_en: The sudden departure of OpenAI's second-in-command has sent shockwaves through the tech community. As a key leader shaping the company's vision, his exit could impact OpenAI's strategic direction and team stability. While reasons remain undisclosed, the event underscores the high talent mobility and internal governance challenges in the fast-evolving AI industry.

items.title: 突发：OpenAI“二号人物”离职
items.summary_zh: HN 热门：突发：OpenAI“二号人物”离职
items.summary_en: Trending on HN: 突发：OpenAI“二号人物”离职

items.title: Agent 进化论：从对话到协作
items.summary_zh: 智能体（Agent）正在经历一场进化，从最初的简单对话交互走向多智能体之间的深度协作。这一转变意味着AI不再只是被动应答，而是能够主动理解任务、拆解目标，并与其他Agent协同工作以完成复杂流程。对于企业而言，这种协作能力将极大提升自动化水平，尤其适用于需要多个系统或角色配合的场景，如供应链管理、客户服务闭环等。
items.summary_en: AI agents are evolving from mere conversational interfaces into collaborative entities capable of working together to achieve complex goals. This shift enables agents to understand tasks, break them down, and coordinate with other agents, moving beyond simple Q&A to orchestrate multi-step workflows. For businesses, this means higher automation potential in areas like supply chain management and customer service, where multiple systems and roles must interact seamlessly. The trend signals a future where AI becomes a true team player rather than a solitary tool.

items.title: 首个具身视频基模开源！LingBot-Video 如何为“机器人大脑”构建物理引擎？
items.summary_zh: LingBot-Video作为首个开源的具身视频基础模型，从海量视频中学习物理规律与物体交互，为机器人提供感知和行动的“物理引擎”。它解决了机器人理解真实世界动态的难题，让机器人在未知环境中更自主地操作。开源发布意味着研究者和开发者可以在此基础上快速构建智能机器人应用，推动具身智能从实验室走向实际场景。
items.summary_en: LingBot-Video is the first open-source foundation model for embodied video understanding, acting as a physics engine for robotic brains. It learns physical rules and object interactions from large-scale videos, enabling robots to perceive and act in real-world environments. This breakthrough addresses the challenge of enabling robots to grasp dynamic scenes without explicit programming. By being open-sourced, it lowers the barrier for robotics researchers and developers, accelerating the deployment of autonomous systems in manufacturing, service, and home robotics.

items.title: Snowflake CoWork：每位知识工作者的专属工作 Agent ｜ 技术趋势
items.summary_zh: Snowflake CoWork是一款专为知识工作者设计的智能工作代理，它利用大语言模型和自动化技术，帮助用户处理文档、数据分析和协作任务。其核心价值在于将重复性工作自动化，让知识工作者能专注于更具创造性的决策。对于数据分析师、产品经理和科研人员而言，CoWork就像一位随时待命的数字助手，显著提升工作效率。
items.summary_en: Snowflake CoWork is a dedicated AI agent tailored for knowledge workers, designed to automate complex workflows involving documents, data analysis, and collaboration. By leveraging large language models, it handles repetitive tasks and provides intelligent assistance, allowing professionals to focus on high-level decisions. This tool is a game-changer for analysts, product managers, and researchers who constantly juggle multiple data sources and documents. Its significance lies in reducing cognitive load and accelerating routine processes, making it a natural evolution of productivity tools in the age of AI.

items.title: 百万上下文下的 DeepSeek V4：SGLang 推理优化实战｜AICon深圳
items.summary_zh: 在AICon深圳大会上，技术团队分享了如何利用SGLang推理框架对DeepSeek V4进行优化，使其能够高效处理百万级别的上下文长度。这一突破意味着大模型可以一次性消化海量信息，比如整本书或长对话记录，而不需要分块处理。对于需要长文档分析、复杂推理或记忆密集型应用的用户来说，这将大幅提升性能和体验，同时也展示了开源推理工具在应对超长序列时的潜力。
items.summary_en: At AICon Shenzhen, engineers demonstrated how SGLang, an inference optimization framework, enables DeepSeek V4 to efficiently handle contexts up to one million tokens. This breakthrough allows the large language model to process entire books or lengthy conversations in one pass, eliminating the need for chunking. For users engaged in long-document analysis, complex reasoning, or memory-intensive tasks, this means better performance and more coherent responses. The achievement also underscores the growing power of open-source inference tools in pushing the boundaries of what LLMs can do with extended contexts.

items.title: 动态分区拆分：Netflix 大幅削减 Cassandra 读取延迟至毫秒级
items.summary_zh: Netflix通过动态分区拆分技术，将Cassandra数据库的读取延迟大幅降低至毫秒级别。这一创新通过将热点数据自动拆分为更小的物理分区，避免了传统方案中因分区过大导致的查询缓慢。对于依赖大规模分布式数据库的流媒体平台而言，该优化显著提升了用户体验和系统效率。
items.summary_en: Netflix has dramatically reduced Cassandra read latency to milliseconds by implementing dynamic partition splitting. This technique automatically splits hot data into smaller physical partitions, eliminating slow queries caused by oversized partitions in traditional setups. For streaming platforms reliant on massive distributed databases, this optimization significantly improves user experience and system efficiency.

items.title: AI Infra 拼什么？
items.summary_zh: AI基础设施（AI Infra）的竞争正在从单纯的算力堆砌转向更全面的生态构建。当前各大厂商比拼的不再只是GPU数量，而是包括数据管道、模型训练与推理框架、资源调度效率以及成本控制在内的综合能力。对于企业而言，选择合适的AI基础设施意味着能否快速迭代模型并降低实际部署成本。这篇文章深入分析了AI Infra的核心比拼维度，帮助读者理解算力之外，存储、网络、平台工具和工程化能力同样是决定胜负的关键因素。
items.summary_en: The competition in AI infrastructure goes beyond just hoarding GPUs. It now hinges on a holistic ecosystem covering data pipelines, training and inference frameworks, resource scheduling, and cost management. This article breaks down the key dimensions that matter most—storage, networking, platform tools, and engineering maturity—explaining why they are just as critical as raw compute for enterprises aiming to iterate quickly and lower deployment costs.

items.title: vLLM 针对多模态模型的推理优化实践｜AICon深圳
items.summary_zh: vLLM是针对大语言模型推理的高性能引擎，最近在AICon深圳大会上展示了其对多模态模型的优化实践。多模态模型如视觉语言模型（VLM）在推理时需要同时处理文本与图像，这对内存和计算提出了更大挑战。vLLM通过改进KV缓存管理、动态批处理和并行解码策略，显著降低了多模态推理的延迟和资源占用。对于部署图像理解、视频分析等应用的团队来说，vLLM的优化能有效降低每路推理成本，提升用户体验。
items.summary_en: vLLM, already known for its high-performance LLM inference engine, recently shared its optimization techniques for multimodal models at the AICon Shenzhen conference. Multimodal models like vision-language models (VLMs) require handling both text and images during inference, posing bigger memory and compute challenges. vLLM addresses this with improved KV cache management, dynamic batching, and parallel decoding, significantly reducing latency and resource usage. Teams deploying image understanding or video analysis applications will benefit from lower per-query costs and better user experience.

items.title: 亚马逊云科技推出 Amazon S3 Annotations
items.summary_zh: 亚马逊云科技推出了Amazon S3 Annotations，这是一项允许用户在S3对象上附加自定义注释的新功能。与传统的对象标签不同，Annotations支持更丰富的元数据描述，例如数据来源、处理步骤、合规标记等。该功能直接集成在S3存储层，无需额外的数据库或索引服务，方便用户对海量数据进行分类、检索和审计。对于数据湖、机器学习流水线和需要严格数据治理的企业来说，S3 Annotations提供了一个简单而强大的方式，让数据更易于管理和使用。
items.summary_en: AWS has launched Amazon S3 Annotations, a new feature that lets users attach custom notes to S3 objects. Unlike simple object tags, Annotations supports richer metadata such as data provenance, processing steps, and compliance labels. It works directly at the S3 storage layer, eliminating the need for external databases or indexing services. This makes it easy to classify, search, and audit large datasets. For data lakes, ML pipelines, and enterprises with strict governance requirements, S3 Annotations offers a simple yet powerful way to make data more manageable and actionable.

items.title: 史上最高调的AI重写：Claude花11天搞定Bun，创始人花一个月才敢交底
items.summary_zh: Anthropic的Claude AI在11天内重写了JavaScript运行时Bun的核心代码，但创始人Jarred Sumner花了一个月才敢对外公布这个消息。这个案例展示了AI在大型软件重写中的惊人效率和潜力，但同时也引发了关于代码质量、可维护性和安全风险的讨论。Sumner的谨慎态度反映出业界对AI生成代码缺乏足够信任和验证机制的现实。这件事给企业带来启示：AI重写可以大幅缩短开发周期，但必须配合严格的代码审查和测试流程，才能真正放心使用。
items.summary_en: Anthropic's Claude AI rewrote the core of Bun, a JavaScript runtime, in just 11 days, but founder Jarred Sumner waited a month before revealing it. This case highlights both the incredible speed of AI-driven code rewriting and the accompanying concerns over quality, maintainability, and security. Sumner's caution reflects the industry's lack of trust and verification mechanisms for AI-generated code. The takeaway for enterprises is that while AI can dramatically shorten development cycles, it must be paired with rigorous code review and testing before deployment can be fully trusted.

items.title: 当 AI 智能体遭遇“至暗时刻”，企业的最后防线是什么？｜ 技术趋势
items.summary_zh: 当AI智能体（AI Agent）在复杂环境中出现错误或失控时，企业的最后防线是什么？这篇文章探讨了智能体面临的“至暗时刻”——比如决策失误、数据泄露、以及不可预测的行为。作者指出，单纯依赖模型能力是不够的，企业需要建立多层防护机制：包括实时监控与警报、人工介入的“切断开关”、以及严格的权限和审计体系。此外，设计上要为智能体设定明确的行为边界和回退策略。只有将安全基因植入AI系统的每一个环节，企业才能在享受自动化红利的同时，避免不可挽回的损失。
items.summary_en: What is an enterprise's last line of defense when an AI agent goes wrong—making faulty decisions, leaking data, or behaving unpredictably? This article discusses the 'darkest hours' of AI agents and argues that relying solely on model capability is insufficient. Companies need a multi-layered protection mechanism: real-time monitoring and alerts, a human-in-the-loop kill switch, strict access controls, and comprehensive auditing. Designers should also define clear behavioral boundaries and fallback strategies. By embedding safety into every layer of the AI system, businesses can reap the benefits of automation without facing irreparable damage.

items.title: EU Parliament greenlights Chat Control 1.0
items.author: rapnie
items.summary_zh: 欧盟议会通过了备受争议的Chat Control 1.0法案，要求数字平台扫描并报告涉及儿童性虐待材料的私密通信内容。这项立法引发了隐私与安全之间的激烈辩论，支持者认为它有助于保护儿童，而反对者警告这可能破坏端到端加密并开创大规模监控的先例。对于关注数字权利和隐私保护的群体来说，这是一个需要密切关注的发展。
items.summary_en: The European Parliament has approved the controversial Chat Control 1.0 regulation, requiring digital platforms to scan private communications for child sexual abuse material. The law sparks intense debate between child safety advocates and privacy defenders, who warn it undermines end-to-end encryption and sets a precedent for mass surveillance. Anyone concerned about digital rights and encryption should pay close attention to this development.

items.title: GPT-5.6
items.author: logickkk1
items.summary_zh: 关于GPT-5.6的传闻在开发者社区悄然升温，据称这是OpenAI内部测试的新一代模型，在推理效率和长文本处理上有显著提升。尽管官方未确认，但泄露的基准测试显示其在复杂编程和数学任务上超越了现有版本。如果属实，这将意味着AI模型在实用性和响应速度上迈入新台阶，对依赖语言模型的开发者和企业影响深远。
items.summary_en: Rumors about GPT-5.6, an alleged internal iteration from OpenAI, have sparked excitement in the developer community. Leaked benchmarks suggest it offers substantial improvements in reasoning efficiency and long-context handling, outperforming current models on complex coding and math tasks. While OpenAI hasn't confirmed the release, the speculation points to a possible leap in practical AI utility, making responses faster and more accurate. For developers and businesses relying on language models, even incremental upgrades can translate into better user experiences and lower latency. This potential release underscores the rapid pace of AI advancement.

items.title: Decoding the obfuscated bash script on a Uniqlo t-shirt
items.author: speerer
items.summary_zh: 一位技术爱好者解析了优衣库T恤上印制的混淆bash脚本，发现它实际上是一个恶作剧程序，通过复杂的字符串操作和陷阱逻辑来隐藏其真实功能。这篇分析展示了逆向工程乐趣，也提醒大家即使看似无害的代码也可能暗藏玄机。对于安全研究人员和编程爱好者来说，这是一次趣味与技术并重的解谜之旅。
items.summary_en: A tech enthusiast meticulously dissected an obfuscated bash script printed on a Uniqlo t-shirt, revealing it to be a playful prank program designed to confuse casual observers. The script uses intricate string manipulations and trap commands to mask its true purpose, which is simply to echo a message. This analysis highlights the fun side of reverse engineering and serves as a reminder that even innocuous-looking code can contain hidden complexity. It's a delightful read for security researchers and programming hobbyists who enjoy a good puzzle.

items.title: John Deere owners will get the right to repair equipment under FTC settlement
items.author: djoldman
items.summary_zh: 美国联邦贸易委员会与约翰迪尔达成和解，农户将获得自主维修农用设备的合法权利。此前约翰迪尔通过软件锁定和专有部件限制第三方维修，导致维修成本高昂。这一和解打破了设备制造商的垄断，赋予农民和独立维修店使用诊断工具和配件的权利。对农业社区和维修行业来说，这是消费者权益的重大胜利，也推动了“维修权”运动的进一步发展。
items.summary_en: John Deere has reached a settlement with the Federal Trade Commission, granting farmers the right to repair their own equipment. Previously, the company's use of software locks and proprietary parts had made independent repairs difficult and costly. This agreement legally requires Deere to provide diagnostic tools, manuals, and parts to owners and independent repair shops. It's a major win for the right-to-repair movement, empowering farmers with more control over their machinery and reducing operational costs. The settlement sets a precedent, potentially pressuring other heavy equipment manufacturers to adopt similar policies.

items.title: Show HN: 18 Words
items.author: pompomsheep
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者展示了他的项目“18 Words”，这是一个限字数的写作挑战工具，鼓励用户用恰好18个词表达一个想法或故事。它本质是一个极简主义写作练习平台，帮助人们提炼语言、聚焦核心。对于作家、社交媒体用户或任何希望提升表达简洁度的人来说，这是一个有趣且富有创造性的工具。
items.summary_en: A developer has introduced '18 Words', a writing challenge tool that prompts users to express an idea or story in exactly eighteen words. It's a minimalist platform for practicing concise writing, helping people distill thoughts to their essence. Writers, social media users, or anyone looking to sharpen their brevity will find this a fun and creative exercise.

items.title: Chatto is now open source
items.author: speckx
items.summary_zh: Chatto宣布正式开源，这款轻量级的聊天工具现在允许开发者自由查看和修改其源代码。Chatto注重简洁和隐私，提供了端到端加密的即时通讯体验，适合那些希望自建聊天服务或深入学习加密通信原理的技术爱好者。开源后，社区可以贡献改进，加速功能迭代。
items.summary_en: Chatto has officially gone open source, allowing developers to freely inspect and modify its code. This lightweight chat application emphasizes simplicity and privacy, offering end-to-end encrypted messaging. It's ideal for tech enthusiasts who want to self-host a chat service or learn about encrypted communication. Open-sourcing invites community contributions, accelerating feature development.

items.title: Chat Control 1.0 and 2.0 Explained
items.author: gasull
items.summary_zh: 一篇文章详细解释了EU的Chat Control 1.0和2.0提案，包括它们的目标、技术要求和争议点。1.0聚焦于扫描已知的儿童虐待材料，而2.0则要求对所有通信进行基于风险的筛查，引发了更广泛的隐私担忧。这篇解读文章为普通人理解这一复杂立法提供了清晰的指南，尤其是对于关心数字隐私和网络监管的用户。
items.summary_en: An article thoroughly explains the EU's Chat Control 1.0 and 2.0 proposals, covering their goals, technical requirements, and controversies. While 1.0 targets scanning known child abuse material, 2.0 mandates risk-based screening of all communications, raising broader privacy concerns. This breakdown serves as a clear guide for anyone trying to understand these complex regulations, especially users concerned about digital privacy and online surveillance.

items.title: Show HN: Getting GLM 5.2 running on my slow computer
items.author: vforno
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者成功让GLM 5.2大语言模型在自己的老旧电脑上运行起来，通过优化和量化技术大幅降低了硬件门槛。这展示了开源模型在低配置设备上落地的可能性，让更多普通用户无需昂贵GPU就能体验前沿AI能力，对推动人工智能民主化具有重要意义。
items.summary_en: A developer managed to run the GLM 5.2 large language model on an old, slow computer using optimization and quantization techniques. This achievement demonstrates that advanced AI can be made accessible without high-end hardware, lowering the barrier for enthusiasts and researchers with limited resources. It underscores the democratizing potential of open-source models.

items.title: Train sim created by just one person is being called the best ever made
items.author: oumua_don17
items.summary_zh: 一款由单人独立开发的火车模拟游戏被玩家誉为史上最佳模拟体验。游戏在细节真实感和操作手感上达到了极高水准，远超许多大厂作品。这不仅证明了个人开发者在小众领域也能创造精品，也为铁路爱好者提供了一款极具沉浸感的驾驶工具。
items.summary_en: A train simulation game created entirely by one person has been hailed by the community as the best ever made. With remarkable attention to detail and realistic controls, it rivals or surpasses products from large studios. This achievement highlights the power of solo development in niche genres and offers train enthusiasts an incredibly immersive driving experience.

items.title: StreetComplete: Fixing OpenStreetMap, one tiny quest at a time
items.author: kls0e
items.summary_zh: StreetComplete 是一款通过微任务引导普通人参与改进 OpenStreetMap 的移动应用。它把地图数据修复分解成一个个简单有趣的小任务，比如确认一条路是否有名称、某个商店是否还在营业，用户只需在散步时顺手回答几个问题就能为开放地图贡献数据。这种方式大大降低了参与地图编辑的门槛，让非技术用户也能轻松成为地图贡献者，从而帮助 OpenStreetMap 保持最新和准确。
items.summary_en: StreetComplete is a mobile app that turns improving OpenStreetMap into bite-sized, fun quests for ordinary people. It breaks down map data fixes into simple tasks, such as confirming a street name or whether a shop is still open. Users can answer these questions while out for a walk, effortlessly contributing to the open map. This approach dramatically lowers the barrier to map editing, allowing non-technical users to become contributors and helping keep OpenStreetMap accurate and up-to-date.

items.title: ExploreYC
items.description: Open-source API for Y Combinator & a16z company data
items.summary_zh: ExploreYC是一个开源API，提供了Y Combinator和a16z投资组合公司的结构化数据访问，包括公司名称、简介、融资轮次和创始团队信息。创业者、投资者和研究人员可以通过该API轻松获取这些顶级孵化器和风投的公开数据，用于市场分析、竞品研究或个人项目。开源特性使得任何人都可以部署或扩展这个数据服务。
items.summary_en: ExploreYC is an open-source API that provides structured access to data from Y Combinator and a16z portfolio companies, including company names, descriptions, funding rounds, and founder details. Entrepreneurs, investors, and researchers can easily retrieve this publicly available data for market analysis, competitive research, or personal projects. Its open-source nature allows anyone to deploy or extend the data service.

items.title: Sim
items.description: Open-source workspace for AI agents and workflows
items.summary_zh: Sim是一个开源的工作空间，专门用于构建和管理AI智能体与工作流。它提供了统一的界面来编排多个AI模型的任务，帮助开发者和数据科学家快速搭建自动化的AI解决方案。其开放性和灵活性使得团队可以高效协作，加速从实验到生产的全过程。
items.summary_en: Sim is an open-source workspace designed for orchestrating AI agents and workflows. It provides a unified platform to manage multiple AI models and automate complex tasks, enabling developers and data scientists to build and deploy AI solutions more efficiently. Its collaborative features and flexibility make it a valuable tool for teams working on AI-driven projects.

items.title: Auriko
items.description: Trading desk for LLM calls
items.summary_zh: Auriko是一个专为大模型调用设计的交易平台，它让开发者能够像交易股票一样买卖LLM的API调用配额。通过这个平台，你可以灵活地管理和优化模型调用成本，在高峰期买入更多调用次数，在低谷时出售多余配额。对于经常使用多个大模型API的团队来说，Auriko提供了一种全新的成本控制方式，让资源分配更加经济和高效。
items.summary_en: Auriko is a trading desk designed specifically for LLM API calls, allowing developers to buy and sell call quotas just like stocks. This platform enables flexible cost management and resource allocation—purchase more calls during peak demand and sell excess during lulls. For teams that rely on multiple large language models, Auriko offers a novel way to optimize spending and ensure efficient usage, making it a compelling tool for cost-conscious AI developers.

items.title: ChatCut
items.description: Your AI video editor in ChatGPT, desktop, and web
items.summary_zh: ChatCut是一款集成在ChatGPT、桌面端和网页端的AI视频编辑器。用户只需用自然语言描述剪辑需求，AI就能自动完成剪切、转场和特效添加等操作。它大幅降低了视频制作的门槛，适合内容创作者和普通用户快速生成高质量视频内容，无需学习专业软件。
items.summary_en: ChatCut is an AI-powered video editor accessible through ChatGPT, desktop app, and web browser. Users simply describe their editing needs in natural language, and the AI handles cutting, transitions, and effects automatically. This significantly lowers the barrier for video creation, making it ideal for content creators and casual users who want professional results without mastering complex editing software.

items.title: PlugThis
items.description: Create your own Chrome Extensions by chatting with AI
items.summary_zh: PlugThis让你通过与AI对话就能创建自己的Chrome扩展程序。无需编程知识，用户描述所需功能后，AI会生成完整的扩展代码。这项工具帮助非技术人员快速定制浏览器功能，提升工作效率，也为开发者提供了一个快速原型验证的轻量级方案。
items.summary_en: PlugThis enables anyone to create Chrome extensions simply by chatting with AI. Users describe the desired functionality, and the AI generates the complete extension code. This tool empowers non-programmers to customize their browser for specific needs, boosting productivity, while also offering developers a quick way to prototype new extension ideas without manual coding.

items.title: Timbal AI
items.description: Build AI agents, workflows, and apps in one stack
items.summary_zh: Timbal AI是一个全栈平台，让你用一套工具就能构建AI代理、工作流和应用程序。它整合了从模型选择到部署的整个流程，无需在多个服务之间切换。无论你是想搭建一个简单的问答机器人，还是一个复杂的自动化流程，Timbal都能提供统一的开发体验。对于追求效率和快速迭代的AI开发者来说，这个一站式解决方案大大降低了开发门槛和运维复杂度。
items.summary_en: Timbal AI is an all-in-one stack for building AI agents, workflows, and applications, consolidating everything from model selection to deployment in a single platform. You no longer need to juggle multiple services—just one environment to design, test, and ship your AI solutions. Whether you're creating a simple chatbot or a complex automation pipeline, Timbal streamlines the development process. It's a boon for developers who value speed and simplicity, reducing both the learning curve and operational overhead.

items.title: Scarlett.
items.description: Your AI Co-Worker in Slack & iMessage
items.summary_zh: Scarlett. 是一款集成在 Slack 和 iMessage 中的 AI 助手，相当于你的“AI 同事”，可以帮你处理消息、回答问题、安排任务等。它直接嵌入日常沟通工具，无需切换应用，就能提升工作效率。对于经常使用这两种聊天平台的团队和个人来说，Scarlett 能无缝融入工作流，减少重复劳动，让沟通变得更智能。
items.summary_en: Scarlett. is an AI co-worker that lives inside Slack and iMessage, helping you manage messages, answer questions, and automate tasks directly within your chat tools. It eliminates the need to switch between apps, making your daily communication smarter and more productive. For teams and individuals heavily reliant on these platforms, Scarlett seamlessly integrates into existing workflows, reducing busywork and letting you focus on higher-value conversations.

items.title: ConnectMachine 2.0
items.description: AI digital business card that remembers everyone you meet
items.summary_zh: ConnectMachine 2.0 是一款 AI 驱动的数字名片工具，能自动记住你遇到的每一个人及其相关信息。它不再只是一张静态电子名片，而是通过人工智能追踪你的社交互动，记录每次见面的细节。对于需要频繁社交的商务人士、销售和创业者来说，它解决了名片丢失和记忆模糊的问题，让关系维护变得简单高效。
items.summary_en: ConnectMachine 2.0 is an AI-powered digital business card that automatically remembers everyone you meet and the context of each interaction. Unlike static e-cards, it tracks your social encounters and stores details like conversation topics and follow-ups. Perfect for business professionals, salespeople, and entrepreneurs who attend many networking events, it eliminates the pain of losing contacts or forgetting meeting details, making relationship management effortless and organized.

items.title: IvyForms
items.description: A WordPress form builder for real workflows
items.summary_zh: IvyForms是一款专为WordPress打造的表单构建插件，但它的目标远不止简单的联系表单。它着眼于真实的工作流程，比如审批流程、动态数据联动、条件逻辑等功能，让非技术人员也能构建复杂的业务表单。对于需要将表单与后台管理深度集成的WordPress站点来说，IvyForms能显著提升效率，减少对开发者的依赖。
items.summary_en: IvyForms is a WordPress form builder that goes beyond simple contact forms to handle real workflows. It supports approval processes, dynamic data linking, conditional logic, and more, enabling non-developers to build complex business forms. For WordPress sites that need deep integration between forms and backend management, IvyForms boosts efficiency and reduces reliance on developers.

items.title: Perfai Security
items.description: Find & fix live vulnerabilities in Vibe Apps with 1-prompt.
items.summary_zh: Perfai Security专门针对“Vibe Apps”这类快速开发的应用程序，提供一键发现并修复实时漏洞的能力。你只需输入一个提示，它就能扫描应用中的安全弱点并给出修复建议。对于使用低代码或快速迭代方式构建应用的团队来说，Perfai填补了安全审查的空缺，让开发者在保持开发速度的同时，不必担心安全问题。它特别适合那些缺乏专职安全团队的小型创业公司。
items.summary_en: Perfai Security is tailor-made for 'Vibe Apps'—rapidly developed applications—offering a one-prompt solution to find and fix live vulnerabilities. Just input a prompt, and it scans your app for security weaknesses while suggesting fixes. For teams building with low-code or fast iteration, Perfai bridges the gap in security review, allowing developers to maintain speed without compromising safety. It's especially valuable for startups that lack dedicated security personnel, providing an easy way to keep their apps secure.

items.title: 小程序上线半年我赚了多少钱？
items.description: 1. 开发历程 时间过得真快，转眼间福猪记账小程序上线已经有半年时间了，从v1.0.0 版本做到了 v1.6.1 版本。今天整理了开发日志，真的不敢相信自己在工作之余能够把它做出来并上线。 2.用户积
items.summary_zh: 一位独立开发者分享了他业余开发的记账小程序“福猪记账”上线半年来的真实收入与运营数据。从v1.0.0迭代到v1.6.1，他记录了开发日志、用户增长曲线和盈利情况。这篇文章不仅展示了个人开发者利用业余时间做产品的可能性，也提供了从零到一、从技术到商业的完整复盘，特别适合想试试副业的程序员参考。
items.summary_en: An indie developer shared the real revenue and operational data of his expense tracking mini-program called 'Fuzhu' over six months since launch. He iterated from v1.0.0 to v1.6.1, documenting development logs, user growth, and profitability. This article demonstrates the possibility of building a product in spare time, offering a complete postmortem from coding to business. It’s especially useful for programmers exploring side projects.

items.title: Cursor 转 Codex 大半个月，聊聊我的真实感受
items.description: Cursor 让我第一次强烈感受到 AI 编程的震撼，Codex 则让我第一次真正感觉到，AI 不只是编程助手，而是一个真正的超级Agent，Codex 明显更接近下一阶段的形态。
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者从Cursor切换到Amazon Codex使用了半个多月，分享了两者的本质差异。Cursor让他第一次感受到AI编程的震撼，但Codex让他真正觉得AI不再只是辅助工具，而是一个能独立执行任务的超级Agent。作者认为Codex更接近下一阶段AI编程的形态，从对话式补全进化到主动式代理，对追求最前沿编程体验的开发者有重要参考价值。
items.summary_en: After switching from Cursor to Amazon Codex for over half a month, a developer shared their real experience of the fundamental differences. While Cursor first impressed them with AI-assisted coding, Codex felt like a true super agent that can independently execute tasks, not just an assistant. The author believes Codex represents the next phase of AI programming—evolving from conversational completion to proactive agency. This comparison is invaluable for developers seeking the cutting edge in AI-powered coding tools.

items.title: 写给年轻程序员的几点建议-2
items.description: 现在互联网红利已经消失了，深知年轻程序员的不易，下面就浅薄地谈几点建议。中国人口基数比较大，要培养自己的 商业嗅觉。你能卖爆一个商品，就能获得巨大的财富。微信公众号如果能写出 几万 浏览量的文章，就有
items.summary_zh: 作者针对互联网红利消退的现状，向年轻程序员提出培养商业嗅觉和写作能力的建议。他认为在中国庞大的人口基数下，能卖爆一个商品或写出高阅读量的公众号文章就能获得巨大财富。文章强调技术之外的市场认知和内容表达能力同样重要，适合处于职业早期的程序员思考如何拓宽收入来源。
items.summary_en: The author offers advice for young programmers in the post-internet-bonus era, emphasizing the need to develop business acumen and writing skills. Given China's huge population, successfully selling a product or writing a viral WeChat article can bring significant wealth. The article argues that market insight and content communication are as crucial as technical skills, making it relevant for early-career programmers looking to diversify their income streams.

items.title: 为什么有的人偏爱 Mac
items.description: 为什么有的人偏爱 Mac 我之前大概用了十几年的 Windows，最近入职了一家新公司，公司强制给我发了 M4 版顶配的 Mac，一开始非常不习惯，到现在也有 3 个多月了。这里和大家分享下日常工作中
items.summary_zh: 作者在使用了十几年 Windows 后，因新公司强制分配顶配 Mac 而被迫切换。三个多月的适应过程让他体会到 macOS 在生态统一、触控板手势和续航方面的独特优势。文章以真实体验对比两者差异，解释了为何许多开发者最终偏爱 Mac，尤其适合那些追求稳定与高效工作流的用户。
items.summary_en: After a decade on Windows, the author was forced to switch to a top‑spec Mac by their new employer. The three‑month adaptation revealed macOS’s strengths in ecosystem integration, trackpad gestures, and battery life. By comparing everyday workflows, the article explains why many developers eventually prefer Mac—it offers a consistent, distraction‑free environment that boosts productivity, especially for long coding sessions.

items.title: 凌晨睡不着，我给台风巴威写了个追踪网站
items.description: 索性爬起来，打开电脑，用 Claude Fable 5 把想法一点点敲了出来。把基于中央气象台、日本气象厅、美国 JTWC、台湾气象署四家的路径数据放在同一张地图上之后，很多事一眼就看明白了
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者凌晨失眠，索性用Claude Fable 5快速搭建了一个台风巴威的追踪网站。他将中央气象台、日本气象厅、美国联合台风警报中心和台湾气象署四家的路径数据整合到同一张地图上，让不同预报机构的差异一目了然。这个项目展示了AI辅助编程的潜力，也体现了数据聚合在气象科普中的价值。
items.summary_en: An insomniac developer built a typhoon tracking website for Typhoon Bavi using Claude Fable 5 in the early hours. He aggregated path data from four weather agencies—China's Central Meteorological Observatory, Japan Meteorological Agency, US Joint Typhoon Warning Center, and Taiwan's Central Weather Bureau—onto a single map, making discrepancies instantly visible. This project demonstrates AI-assisted programming's potential and the value of data aggregation in weather education.

items.title: 面试官问你：“AI 能写 80% 的代码了，公司为什么还需要你？”
items.description: 先说一个事实：2026 年的技术面试，已经和两年前完全不一样了。两年前面试问的是："手写一个 Promise"、"说说 React Fiber 原理"...现在面试官默认你会用 AI。他们真正想知道的
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了在AI能写出80%代码的背景下，技术面试如何从考察基础原理转向考察程序员的独特价值。面试官默认你熟悉AI工具，他们更看重问题拆解、业务理解、架构思维和人机协作能力，提醒开发者要聚焦AI无法替代的核心竞争力。
items.summary_en: The article explores how technical interviews have transformed as AI now writes 80% of the code. Interviewers assume proficiency with AI tools and instead evaluate skills that make developers irreplaceable: problem decomposition, business understanding, architectural thinking, and effective human-AI collaboration. It cautions against over-reliance on AI-generated code and urges developers to cultivate uniquely human competencies for long-term career relevance.

items.title: 面试官：“你连Claude Code都没用过吗？”，我怼回去：“就没用过又怎么了？”
items.description: 现在提起AI编程工具，Claude Code绝对是大家心目中的首选。甚至在面试当中，一句“你有没有用过Claude Code？”，已然成为衡量你技术敏感度的‘试金石’。！今天给大家分享下它的实战玩法！
items.summary_zh: 文章以面试中被问及Claude Code使用经历的场景为引子，作者起初对面试官的质疑表示不满，但随后分享了自己实际使用Claude Code的实战玩法。文中详细介绍了Claude Code在代码生成、调试和重构中的高效表现，强调了掌握AI编程工具正在成为技术敏感度的新标尺。对于求职者和开发者而言，这不仅是工具推荐，更是职业发展的提醒。
items.summary_en: The article starts with a job interview where the candidate is asked about Claude Code experience, initially feeling defensive. But then the author shares practical tips on using Claude Code for code generation, debugging, and refactoring, highlighting how proficiency in AI coding tools is becoming a benchmark for technical savvy. For job seekers and developers, it's not just a tool recommendation but a wake-up call for career growth.

items.title: 🚀 2026 年 6 月 GitHub 十大热门项目排行榜 🔥
items.description: 欢迎来到 2026 年 6 月 GitHub 热门开源项目排行榜！聚焦 Agent 感知 + 技能市场 + 视频生产 + 代码智能 + 并行编排五大主线！
items.summary_zh: 文章盘点了2026年6月GitHub上最热门的十大开源项目，聚焦五大技术主线：Agent感知、技能市场、视频生产、代码智能和并行编排。这些项目反映了当前AI和开发者工具领域的最新趋势，例如自主智能体框架、去中心化技能交易平台、AI视频生成工具、代码补全与审查增强插件，以及并行计算调度方案。对于希望紧跟开源前沿的开发者，这篇榜单提供了一份值得关注的项目清单。
items.summary_en: This article highlights the top ten trending open source projects on GitHub in June 2026, organized around five key themes: agent perception, skill marketplaces, video production, code intelligence, and parallel orchestration. The projects showcase cutting-edge developments in AI agents, decentralized skill trading platforms, AI-powered video generation, smart code completion and review tools, and high-performance parallel scheduling frameworks. For developers who want to stay ahead of the open source curve, this curated list offers a valuable snapshot of where the ecosystem is heading.

items.title: 字节二面：1000瓶酒，有一瓶是毒药，多少只老鼠可以查出来？
items.description: 1000瓶酒里混了一瓶毒药，用老鼠试毒，老鼠在喝完毒酒1小时后死亡，问最少几只老鼠能找出来？大多数人卡在这道题上，是因为陷入了“流水线思维”——总想着让老鼠一只接一只地去试，或者用老鼠的命去填。
items.summary_zh: 这是一道经典的老鼠试毒智力题：1000瓶酒中只有一瓶有毒，老鼠喝下毒酒后一小时内死亡，问最少需要多少只老鼠才能找出毒酒？大多数人被困在“一只一只试”的线性思维里，实际上用二进制编码的思路，每只老鼠代表一个二进制位，通过组合测试，仅需10只老鼠就能在1小时内锁定毒酒。这道题考察的是将问题转化为二进制编码的能力，常用于面试中测试候选人的逻辑思维和算法素养。
items.summary_en: This is a classic logic puzzle: among 1000 bottles of wine, exactly one is poisoned; a mouse dies within one hour after drinking the poison. What's the minimum number of mice needed to identify the poisoned bottle? Many people fall into the trap of linear testing, but the trick is to use binary encoding—each mouse represents a binary digit, and by combining tests, just 10 mice can pinpoint the poison within an hour. The problem tests your ability to reframe a problem in terms of binary representation, making it a favorite in tech interviews to evaluate logical thinking and algorithmic ingenuity.

items.title: 为什么我会主动给一个年轻程序员加薪、晋升？
items.description: 2年来，我把团队里一个初级开发晋升到了中级开发，同时给他加了工资，年终奖也比之前高了不少。 很多人经常问： 我不想讲太空泛的词，比如责任心、执行力、主人翁意识之类的。 我直接讲一个真实案例。 看看这个
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章通过一个真实案例，讲述了一位团队管理者为何主动给一位初级程序员加薪并晋升至中级。作者没有空谈责任心等抽象概念，而是具体展示了这位程序员如何通过扎实的技术能力、解决实际问题的主动性和持续学习，打动了管理者。文章启示我们，升职加薪的关键在于拿出看得见的成果和成长，而非仅靠态度表忠心。
items.summary_en: This article shares a real story of why a team manager proactively gave a junior developer a raise and promotion to mid-level. Instead of using vague terms like responsibility, the author shows concrete actions: solid coding, proactive problem-solving, and continuous improvement. The case demonstrates that visible contributions and personal growth, not just a good attitude, truly deserve compensation. It offers practical advice for both managers seeking to retain talent and developers aiming for career advancement.

items.title: 网传 id Software 的 id Tech 团队被微软裁到只剩一人，是真的吗？为何会这样？
items.summary_zh: 网传微软收购 id Software 后将 id Tech 团队裁减至仅剩一人，消息引发游戏界震动。虽然真实性待确证，但若属实，这意味着 id Tech 引擎的未来维护和开发可能面临巨大危机。id Tech 是《毁灭战士》《雷神之锤》等经典作品的基石，其技术遗产能否延续成为业界关注的焦点。
items.summary_en: A rumor claims Microsoft has downsized id Software's id Tech team to just one person after the acquisition, sending shockwaves through the gaming community. While unconfirmed, if true, it would jeopardize the future of the id Tech engine, the foundation of iconic games like Doom and Quake. The industry now watches closely to see whether this legendary technology can survive under Microsoft's stewardship, or if its legacy is being quietly wound down.

items.title: 2026 EWC 饿狼传说项目曾卓君爆冷不敌 naiwang 首轮出局，如何评价本场比赛？
items.summary_zh: 在2026年电竞世界杯的《饿狼传说》项目中，中国格斗游戏传奇选手曾卓君（小孩）意外首轮输给了名不见经传的naiwang，爆冷出局。这场比赛引发了社区热烈讨论，有人认为这是小孩状态下滑的信号，也有人归因于新版角色平衡性调整带来的不确定性。这场失利不仅打破了小孩在格斗赛事中的统治神话，也让人们重新审视《饿狼传说》项目的竞技格局——新人的崛起和老将的适应力成为焦点。对于格斗游戏爱好者和电竞观众来说，这是一场充满戏剧性和启示意义的对决，提醒人们电竞世界里没有永远的冠军。
items.summary_en: At the 2026 Esports World Cup, legendary Chinese fighting game player Zeng Zhuojun, known as 'Xiaohai', suffered a shocking first-round defeat against the relatively unknown player naiwang in the Fatal Fury tournament. This upset has ignited heated discussions in the fighting game community, with some attributing it to Xiaohai's declining form and others pointing to balance changes in the new version that disrupt established strategies. The loss not only breaks Xiaohai's long-standing dominance but also reshapes the competitive landscape of Fatal Fury, highlighting the rise of newcomers and the challenges veterans face in adapting. For esports enthusiasts and fighting game fans, this match serves as a dramatic reminder that no champion is invincible in the ever-evolving world of competitive gaming.

items.title: RalphLoop 称「300 行写不出 Cursor 就别待这行」，这是否反映了当代开发者技能的不足？
items.summary_zh: RalphLoop 公开声称“300行写不出Cursor就别待这行”，这引发了关于当代开发者技能水平的争议。正方认为这是对基础编程能力的底线要求，反方则指出Cursor等AI辅助工具已改变开发方式，不应再用纯手写代码来衡量能力。其实这场争论背后，是技术演进中“手写能力”与“工具运用能力”之间的永恒张力。
items.summary_en: RalphLoop's claim that developers who cannot write a Cursor in 300 lines should leave the industry has stirred debate on essential coding skills. Supporters see it as a minimal benchmark for fundamentals, while critics argue that modern AI tools have shifted what proficiency means. The controversy highlights the tension between traditional hand-coding expertise and the ability to leverage productivity tools—a reflection of how the definition of developer competence evolves with technology.

items.title: 为什么 AI 一次性写不好代码，一直需要程序员给擦屁股呢？
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了一个常见现象：AI 虽然能写出代码，但往往存在漏洞、逻辑错误或不符合需求，需要程序员反复检查和修复。作者分析原因在于 AI 缺乏对业务上下文、系统整体架构和隐性需求的深入理解，且容易生成“看起来对但其实不对”的代码。文章提醒我们，AI 是强大辅助工具，但当前阶段仍无法取代程序员的判断力和经验。
items.summary_en: This article explores why AI often fails to write perfect code on the first try, requiring human programmers to fix bugs and logic errors. The author attributes this to AI's lack of deep understanding of business context, system architecture, and implicit requirements—it generates code that looks plausible but may be fundamentally wrong. It serves as a reminder that while AI is a powerful coding assistant, it still cannot replace the judgment and experience of human developers in the current era.
